subtitle.en: octopus skin stacks three cell types — chromatophores (pigment), iridophores (tunable Bragg reflectors), leucophores (white scatterers) — giving structural blue/green plus broadband background

description.en: Three-layer schematic with toggle. Combining pigmentary + structural + white scatter underlies cephalopod camouflage.
description.ko: 3층 schematic + 토글. 색소+구조+백색 산란 조합이 두족류 위장 기반.
